title: Xyloid Springy Canadian Duck Leg Skewers
description: Buttery and springy Canadian dish featuring duck legs, tadka, and macrobiotic-friendly ingredients, grilled to perfection on a robata-grill.
instructions: Preheat the robata-grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together butter, tadka spice blend, lemon juice, and olive oil.
Add the duck legs to the bowl and toss to coat with the butter mixture.
Thread the duck legs onto skewers, leaving a small space between each leg.
Season the duck legs with sea salt and garlic.
Grill the skewers on the robata-grill for 20 minutes, turning occasionally.
Brush the duck legs with additional butter mixture during the last 5 minutes of grilling.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
